title: Mastering `font-display`: The Key to Seamless Web Font Loading & UX
tweet: Enhance #WebFonts #UX! Learn how `font-display` in #CSS is crucial for smooth loading and preventing FOUT/FOIT. A must-know for better #UIDesign and #CSStypography. #webdev
tip: To significantly improve perceived performance and user experience, always include the `font-display` property in your `@font-face` rules. Using `font-display: swap;` is often the optimal choice, as it renders text immediately with a fallback font and swaps to the custom font once loaded, avoiding invisible text (FOIT) and a harsh flash of unstyled text (FOUT). This ensures content is readable faster, a core aspect of good UI design.
